Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:judge}{courtSprite:judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}Court is now in session for the trial of the defendant.

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: Is the defense ready?

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:400}{courtView:defense}{fadeInBg:400}{fadeInCharacter:400}{courtSprite:defense["Normal"]}The defense is ready, Your Honor.

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:400}{courtView:judge}{fadeInBg:400}{fadeInCharacter:400}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]}And the prosecution?

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:400}{courtView:prosecution}{fadeInBg:400}{fadeInCharacter:400}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident"]}The prosecution has been ready for some time, Your Honor.

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Nod"]}Very well.{p:300}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]} Prosecutor Edgeworth, your opening statement, please.

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Confident"]}With pleasure.

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Confident"]}On the night in question, the defendant was the only person with access to the crime scene.

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {courtSprite:prosecution["Pointing"]}The prosecution will demonstrate this beyond a shadow of a doubt!

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {courtPan:defense,600}{courtSprite:defense["Sweating"]}{color:lightblue}{blip:0,false}(This isn't going to be easy...)

Court_Trial.name: Maya
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:cocounsel}{sprite:Maya["Determined"]}{blip:1}Don't worry, Nick! We've been through worse!

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {sprite:Maya["Determined"]}{color:lightblue}{blip:0,false}(Maya's right. I need to stay focused.)

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]}{blip:1}The prosecution may call its first witness.

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Normal"]}The prosecution calls Detective Dick Gumshoe to the stand.

Court_Trial.name: Gumshoe
Court_Trial.text: {courtPan:witness,600}{courtSprite:witness["Confident"]}{fadeInCharacter}Detective Dick Gumshoe, reporting for duty, sir!

Court_Trial.name: Gumshoe
Court_Trial.text: {courtSprite:witness["Normal"]}I was the lead detective on this case, sir.

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]}Please testify about your findings, Detective.

Court_Trial.name: Gumshoe
Court_Trial.text: {fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:400}{courtView:witness}{fadeInBg:400}{fadeInCharacter:400}{courtSprite:witness["Thinking"]}Well, we found the body at around 10 PM, sir.

Court_Trial.name: Gumshoe
Court_Trial.text: {courtSprite:witness["Determined"]}The evidence at the scene pointed directly to the defendant!

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {courtPan:defense,600}{courtSprite:defense["Confident"]}Your Honor, I'd like to cross-examine the witness.

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]}You may proceed, Mr. Wright.

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}Detective! You say the evidence points to the defendant...

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {courtSprite:defense["Determined"]}But isn't it true that there was another person at the scene?!

Court_Trial.name: Gumshoe
Court_Trial.text: {courtPan:witness,400}{courtSprite:witness["Sad"]}W-Well, yeah... but that doesn't mean...

Court_Trial.name: Maya
Court_Trial.text: {changeCharacter:Maya["Confident"]}Don't worry, Nick! We've been through worse!

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {courtPan:prosecution,400}{courtSprite:prosecution["Dismayed"]}Objection! The presence of another person is irrelevant!

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {courtPan:defense,400}{courtSprite:defense["Thinking"]}{color:lightblue}{blip:0,false}(Edgeworth's not going to back down that easily...)

Court_Trial.name: Maya
Court_Trial.text: {fadeOutBg:400}{fadeOutCharacter:400}{courtView:cocounsel}{fadeInBg:400}{fadeInCharacter:400}{sprite:Maya["Strict"]}{blip:1}Nick, what about that piece of evidence we found?

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {sprite:Maya["Strict"]}{color:lightblue}{blip:0,false}(That's it! Maya's right!)

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Confident"]}{blip:1}Your Honor! I have evidence that will turn this case around!

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Surprised"]}Oh? Let's see it then!

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:defense}{courtSprite:defense["Pointing"]}Take a look at THIS!

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {courtPan:prosecution,400}{courtSprite:prosecution["Dismayed"]}Wh-What?!

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Thinking"]}Hmm...{p:500} This is quite interesting indeed.

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {sprite:Judge["Stern"]}This evidence does cast doubt on the prosecution's case.

Court_Trial.name: Edgeworth
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:prosecution}{courtSprite:prosecution["Thinking"]}...Tch.

Court_Trial.name: Maya
Court_Trial.text: {courtView:cocounsel}{sprite:Maya["Exasperated"]}Nick! You did it!

Court_Trial.name: Phoenix
Court_Trial.text: {sprite:Maya["Exasperated"]}{color:lightblue}{blip:0,false}(We're not out of the woods yet, but this is a good start.)

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {blip:1}{courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]}This court will take a brief recess.
{fadeOutBg:1000}{fadeOutCharacter:1000}A few minutes later...

Court_Trial.name: Judge
Court_Trial.text: {fadeInBg:1000}{fadeInCharacter:1000}{courtView:judge}{sprite:Judge["Normal"]}Court is now back in session. The defense may continue.
{courtView:witness}{fadeOutBg:1500}{fadeOutCharacter:1500}{center}End of courtroom test scene.
